title: 信息日报 2026-07-14

headline.title: DOOMQL：用 SQLite 驱动的 Doom 风格游戏，创意突破引发热议
headline.summary: Peter Gostev 利用 GPT-5.6 Sol 构建了 DOOMQL，一款将 SQLite 作为游戏引擎的 Doom 风格游戏。该项目展示了极其创新的编程思路：SQL 负责运动、碰撞、敌人、战斗、进度乃至每个 RGB 像素，挑战了传统游戏开发范式。
headline.title_en: DOOMQL: A Doom-like Game Powered by SQLite Breaks Creative Boundaries
headline.summary_en: Peter Gostev built DOOMQL using GPT-5.6 Sol, a Doom-like game where SQLite serves as the game engine. SQL handles movement, collision, enemies, combat, progression, and every RGB pixel, demonstrating an innovative approach to game development.
headline.reason: 该项目在开发者社区中极具话题性，展示了 AI 辅助编程与数据库技术的创造性结合，评分最高，体现了当日开发与编程版面的核心亮点。
headline.reason_en: This project generates significant buzz in the developer community, showcasing a creative fusion of AI-assisted coding and database technology. With the highest score, it captures the essence of the development and programming section.
